items.title: Phase II Trial of hOKT3gamma1(Ala-Ala) Teplizumab for Treatment of Patients With Recent Onset Type 1 Diabetes

A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-Blind, Multinational, Placebo-Controlled Study to Evaluate Efficacy and Safety of Teplizumab (MGA031)... in Children and Adults With Recent-Onset Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus

open_targets.reason: Open Targets GraphQL API requires a POST-capable HTTP client; no such MCP connector was available in this session. Wire via external_evidence_cache.fetch_open_targets when deployed with direct network access.
